$schema-comment: Production defaults for the WPF tray-app. Mirrors VamAcarsClient.Cli/appsettings.json with one delta: the Serilog WriteTo array drops the Console sink because the tray-app runs as WinExe with no attached console (that's also why we didn't add Serilog.Sinks.Console as a NuGet ref). File-sink only.

Storage._comment: Reuses the same folder/token-name as the Cli — both clients share a single TokenStore so pairing via Cli is reflected in the tray-app and vice versa.

Serilog._comment: File-sink only (no Console). Path {LogPath} expands at startup to %LOCALAPPDATA%\VamAcarsClient\logs\. Note the WriteTo index used by the {LogPath} substitution is 0 here, NOT 1 like in the Cli's config — keep this in mind when copy-pasting.
